untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires detection of two distinct bottom formations (Eve & Adam structure) with specific geometric properties (height classification relative to 18.03%/21.26% medians, width classification relative to 50/48 day medians, and bottom price variation relative to 1.78%/1.89% medians). These multi-bar pattern characteristics cannot be expressed using only single-bar price/indicator conditions and the allowed operators. Requires custom pattern detection logic not available in indicator-based rule format.
translation_notes: Signal requires visual pattern recognition of double bottom formations with comparative statistics across multiple bars. The entry conditions describe pattern morphology (Eve & Adam structure, tall/short classification, narrow/wide classification, variation metrics) that demand pattern-matching algorithms rather than indicator thresholds. Exit condition marked AUTHOR_SILENT was converted to generic reversal logic. Hold period set to 70 days based on source data histogram range. Stop loss set to standard 5% based on failure_rate_5pct parameter.
